title: Sustained double-talk (both parties live)

transcript.agent: And then once we verify the account we can move the funds over to the new routing number that you gave me a moment ago before we finish up here today.
transcript.caller: but that is the account I told you I closed last week, do not send it there

why_it_matters: Both voices are live at full energy for more than a second. This is the hardest case for energy based turn taking because there is no clean silence to key off. A tolerant but real bound is used here: the agent may talk over the caller briefly, but it must still yield rather than finish its sentence. Talk-over seconds is the signal that separates graceful from stubborn agents.
